title: pulsatilla × weberi
intro: Pulsatilla × weberi is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between Pulsatilla occidentalis and Pulsatilla occidentalis var. weberi, belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat menstrual issues, such as irregular periods and heavy bleeding, due to its estrogenic and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Pulsatilla × weberi include its use in alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Pulsatilla × weberi is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
